description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped stone with a predominantly dark gray to black coloration, interspersed with lighter gray and white veining and patches. The stone has a rough, natural texture with uneven surfaces and jagged edges, suggesting it has not been artificially shaped or polished. One side of the stone features a small, rectangular label with handwritten text, indicating it may have been cataloged or collected for study or landscaping. The stone appears relatively thin when viewed from the side, with a slab-like profile and a slightly curved contour. Its surface displays a marbled pattern, with cloudy streaks and mottled areas that add visual complexity. The overall appearance suggests a dense, hard rock, possibly slate or a similar metamorphic stone, suitable for use as an obstacle or decorative element in urban environments.
description: A dark gray, slab-like stone with rough, jagged edges and marbled white veining, featuring a natural, unpolished texture and a thin profile.
description_view_0: The stone appears broad and flat, with prominent marbled veining and a rugged, uneven surface.
description_view_1: From the side, the stone looks very thin and elongated, revealing its slab-like profile and layered structure.
description_view_2: This view shows the opposite broad face, with a visible label and more pronounced white veining across the dark surface.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the stone's thinness and irregular edge contours.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or obstacle on the ground
attribute_pattern: Irregular marbled veining and mottling with cloudy white and gray streaks across a dark background, creating a natural, organic pattern.
attribute_weathering: Surface is rough and unpolished, with minor chipping and natural wear, indicating moderate exposure to the elements but no significant erosion.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts moderately with paved or manicured urban surfaces, but can blend with other natural stones or landscaping elements; may be partially surrounded by soil or grass.
